option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<view class="search-coupons"> <van-search class="search-coupons-ipt" value="{{couponsCode}}" bind:change="onCouponsCodeChange" bind:search="getCoupons" background="#252a34" shape="round" clear-trigger="always" input-align="center" placeholder="请输入口令兑换优惠卷"/> </view>
<scroll-view class="cart-list" wx:if="{{carts && carts.length > 0}}" bindscrolltolower="pageMore" scroll-y="true"> <van-divider class="clear-cart-divider" bind:tap="clearCart" contentPosition="right" dashed> <van-icon name="delete-o"/> <text>清空购物车</text> </van-divider> <van-checkbox-group class="cart-card-group" value="{{ courseIds }}" bind:change="changeCourseIds"> <van-swipe-cell class="cart-card-cell" wx:for="{{carts}}" wx:key="id" right-width="{{ 55 }}"> <van-card class="cart-card" title="{{item.courseTitle}}" price="{{item.coursePrice}} 元" origin-price="{{item.coursePrice / 0.8}} 元" tag="热卖" desc="精品课程【爆款】【热卖】"> <view slot="thumb"> <van-row> <van-col span="8"> <van-checkbox class="cart-cbx" name="{{item.fkCourseId}}" data-price="{{item.coursePrice}}"/> </van-col> <van-col span="8"> <van-image class="cart-image" src="{{MINIO_COURSE_COVER}}{{item.courseCover}}" bind:tap="showDetail" data-course-id="{{item.fkCourseId}}" width="130" height="90"/> </van-col> </van-row> </view> </van-card> <view class="cart-card-right-slot" slot="right"> <van-button class="remove-btn" bind:tap="removeCart" data-id="{{item.id}}" type="danger"> <view>移</view> <view>除</view> </van-button> </view> </van-swipe-cell> </van-checkbox-group> </scroll-view>
<van-empty class="cart-list-empty" wx:else image="error" description="暂无购物车记录"/>
<view class="submit-order"> <van-submit-bar custom-class="submit-bar" price="{{ payAmount * 100 }}" bind:submit="openPayDialog" button-text="提交订单" tip="{{ true }}"> <van-tag class="coupons-btn" bind:tap="openCouponsSheet" type="warning">优惠卷详情</van-tag> <view slot="tip">课程属于虚拟产品，购买后不支持退换！</view> </van-submit-bar> </view>
<van-action-sheet class="coupons-sheet" title="优惠卷详情" show="{{ couponsShow }}" bind:close="closeCouponsSheet"> <van-cell-group class="coupons-sheet-body" wx:if="{{coupons.id}}" inset> <van-cell title="兑换口令" value="{{coupons.code}}" icon="gift-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="标题名称" value="{{coupons.title}}" icon="notes-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="优惠金额" value="减免 {{coupons.cpPrice}} 元" icon="coupon-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="详情描述" value="{{coupons.info}}" icon="comment-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="生效时间" value="{{coupons.startTime}}" icon="clock-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="过期时间" value="{{coupons.endTime}}" icon="clock-o" title-width="100rpx"/> </van-cell-group> <van-empty class="coupons-sheet-body-empty" wx:else image="error" description="暂未使用优惠卷"/> </van-action-sheet>
<van-dialog class="pay-dialog" title="支付订单" show="{{ payDialogShow }}" show-confirm-button="{{false}}" use-slot width="400px"> <van-divider dashed/> <view class="countdown-time"> <van-count-down class="pay-countdown" wx:if="{{countDownShow}}" time="{{ time }}" bind:change="countDown" bind:finish="onCountDownFinish" use-slot> <view class="title">【请在15分钟内完成付款】</view> <text class="item">{{ timeData.hours }}</text> <text class="delimiter">时 </text> <text class="item">{{ timeData.minutes }}</text> <text class="delimiter">分 </text> <text class="item">{{ timeData.seconds }}</text> <text class="delimiter">秒 </text> </van-count-down> </view> <van-divider dashed/> <view class="pay-dialog-label">支付宝扫码</view> <van-image class="qrcode-image" src="{{qrCodeImage}}" width="300" height="200"/> <van-divider dashed/> <van-button class="cancel-btn" bind:tap="cancelPay" block type="info">取消支付</van-button> </van-dialog>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<view class="search-coupons"> <van-search class="search-coupons-ipt" value="{{couponsCode}}" bind:change="onCouponsCodeChange" bind:search="getCoupons" background="#252a34" shape="round" clear-trigger="always" input-align="center" placeholder="请输入口令兑换优惠卷"/> </view>
<scroll-view class="cart-list" wx:if="{{carts && carts.length > 0}}" bindscrolltolower="pageMore" scroll-y="true"> <van-divider class="clear-cart-divider" bind:tap="clearCart" contentPosition="right" dashed> <van-icon name="delete-o"/> <text>清空购物车</text> </van-divider> <van-checkbox-group class="cart-card-group" value="{{ courseIds }}" bind:change="changeCourseIds"> <van-swipe-cell class="cart-card-cell" wx:for="{{carts}}" wx:key="id" right-width="{{ 55 }}"> <van-card class="cart-card" title="{{item.courseTitle}}" price="{{item.coursePrice}} 元" origin-price="{{item.coursePrice / 0.8}} 元" tag="热卖" desc="精品课程【爆款】【热卖】"> <view slot="thumb"> <van-row> <van-col span="8"> <van-checkbox class="cart-cbx" name="{{item.fkCourseId}}" data-price="{{item.coursePrice}}"/> </van-col> <van-col span="8"> <van-image class="cart-image" src="{{MINIO_COURSE_COVER}}{{item.courseCover}}" bind:tap="showDetail" data-course-id="{{item.fkCourseId}}" width="130" height="90"/> </van-col> </van-row> </view> </van-card> <view class="cart-card-right-slot" slot="right"> <van-button class="remove-btn" bind:tap="removeCart" data-id="{{item.id}}" type="danger"> <view>移</view> <view>除</view> </van-button> </view> </van-swipe-cell> </van-checkbox-group> </scroll-view>
<van-empty class="cart-list-empty" wx:else image="error" description="暂无购物车记录"/>
<view class="submit-order"> <van-submit-bar custom-class="submit-bar" price="{{ payAmount * 100 }}" bind:submit="openPayDialog" button-text="提交订单" tip="{{ true }}"> <van-tag class="coupons-btn" bind:tap="openCouponsSheet" type="warning">优惠卷详情</van-tag> <van-tag class="coupons-btn" bind:tap="removeSelected" type="danger">删除所选</van-tag> <view slot="tip">课程属于虚拟产品，购买后不支持退换！</view> </van-submit-bar> </view>
<van-action-sheet class="coupons-sheet" title="优惠卷详情" show="{{ couponsShow }}" bind:close="closeCouponsSheet"> <van-cell-group class="coupons-sheet-body" wx:if="{{coupons.id}}" inset> <van-cell title="兑换口令" value="{{coupons.code}}" icon="gift-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="标题名称" value="{{coupons.title}}" icon="notes-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="优惠金额" value="减免 {{coupons.cpPrice}} 元" icon="coupon-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="详情描述" value="{{coupons.info}}" icon="comment-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="生效时间" value="{{coupons.startTime}}" icon="clock-o" title-width="100rpx"/> <van-cell title="过期时间" value="{{coupons.endTime}}" icon="clock-o" title-width="100rpx"/> </van-cell-group> <van-empty class="coupons-sheet-body-empty" wx:else image="error" description="暂未使用优惠卷"/> </van-action-sheet>
<van-dialog class="pay-dialog" title="支付订单" show="{{ payDialogShow }}" show-confirm-button="{{false}}" use-slot width="400px"> <van-divider dashed/> <view class="countdown-time"> <van-count-down class="pay-countdown" wx:if="{{countDownShow}}" time="{{ time }}" bind:change="countDown" bind:finish="onCountDownFinish" use-slot> <view class="title">【请在15分钟内完成付款】</view> <text class="item">{{ timeData.hours }}</text> <text class="delimiter">时 </text> <text class="item">{{ timeData.minutes }}</text> <text class="delimiter">分 </text> <text class="item">{{ timeData.seconds }}</text> <text class="delimiter">秒 </text> </van-count-down> </view> <van-divider dashed/> <view class="pay-dialog-label">支付宝扫码</view> <van-image class="qrcode-image" src="{{qrCodeImage}}" width="300" height="200"/> <van-divider dashed/> <van-button class="cancel-btn" bind:tap="cancelPay" block type="info">取消支付</van-button> </van-dialog>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<van-sticky> <view class="detail-video" wx:if="{{videoSrc}}"> <video src="{{videoSrc}}" poster="{{videoPoster}}" controls show-center-play-btn title="{{videoTitle}}"></video> </view> </van-sticky>
<view class="danmu-bar" wx:if="{{course}}"> <input class="danmu-input" placeholder="发一条弹幕" value="{{danmuText}}" bindinput="onDanmuInput" /> <van-cell title="标题" value="{{course.title}}" icon="notes-o"/> <van-cell title="作者" value="{{course.author}}" icon="user-o"/> <van-cell title="价格" value="{{course.price}} 元" icon="gold-coin-o"/> <van-cell title="创建" value="{{course.created}}" icon="clock-o"/> <van-cell title="更新" value="{{course.updated}}" icon="clock-o"/> </van-cell-group>
<van-tabs active="{{ activeTab }}" bind:change="onTabChange"> <van-tab title="摘要"> <van-image wx:if="{{course.summary}}" width="100%" height="400rpx" fit="contain" src="{{MINIO_COURSE_SUMMARY}}{{course.summary}}"/> <van-empty wx:else description="暂无摘要图"/> </van-tab> <van-tab title="目录"> <view class="catalog" wx:for="{{course.seasons}}" wx:key="id" wx:for-item="season"> <view class="season-title">{{season.title}}</view> <view class="ep" wx:for="{{season.episodes}}" wx:key="id" wx:for-item="ep">· {{ep.title}}</view> </view> </van-tab> </van-tabs>
<view class="detail-actions"> <van-button icon="service-o" type="default" bind:tap="chatMe">客服</van-button> <van-button icon="shopping-cart-o" type="warning" bind:tap="toCart">购物车</van-button> <van-button type="primary" bind:tap="addToCart">加入购物车</van-button> <van-button type="danger" bind:tap="pay">立即购买</van-button> </view> </view>
<van-empty wx:else description="加载中或课程不存在"/>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<view class="detail-page" wx:if="{{course}}"> <scroll-view class="detail-scroll" scroll-y="true"> <van-sticky> <view class="detail-video" wx:if="{{videoSrc}}"> <video id="courseVideo" src="{{videoSrc}}" poster="{{videoPoster}}" controls show-center-play-btn show-fullscreen-btn enable-play-gesture enable-danmu danmu-list="{{danmuList}}" danmu-btn object-fit="contain" autoplay title="{{videoTitle}}" bindtimeupdate="onVideoTimeUpdate"></video> </view> </van-sticky>
<view class="danmu-bar"> <input class="danmu-input" placeholder="发一条弹幕" value="{{danmuText}}" bindinput="onDanmuInput" /> <button class="danmu-send" type="primary" size="mini" bindtap="sendDanmu">发送</button> </view>
<view class="detail-main"> <van-divider dashed>课程信息</van-divider> <van-cell-group inset> <van-cell title="类别" value="{{course.categoryTitle}}" icon="label-o"/> <van-cell title="标题" value="{{course.title}}" icon="notes-o"/> <van-cell title="作者" value="{{course.author}}" icon="user-o"/> <van-cell title="价格" value="{{course.price}} 元" icon="gold-coin-o"/> <van-cell title="创建" value="{{course.created}}" icon="clock-o"/> <van-cell title="更新" value="{{course.updated}}" icon="clock-o"/> </van-cell-group>
<van-tabs active="{{ activeTab }}" bind:change="onTabChange"> <van-tab title="摘要"> <van-image wx:if="{{course.summary}}" width="100%" height="400rpx" fit="contain" src="{{MINIO_COURSE_SUMMARY}}{{course.summary}}"/> <van-empty wx:else description="暂无摘要图"/> </van-tab> <van-tab title="目录"> <view class="catalog" wx:for="{{course.seasons}}" wx:key="id" wx:for-item="season"> <view class="season-title">{{season.title}}</view> <view class="ep" wx:for="{{season.episodes}}" wx:key="id" wx:for-item="ep">· {{ep.title}}</view> </view> </van-tab> </van-tabs> </view> </scroll-view>
<view class="detail-actions"> <van-button icon="service-o" type="default" bind:tap="chatMe">客服</van-button> <van-button icon="shopping-cart-o" type="warning" bind:tap="toCart">购物车</van-button> <van-button type="primary" bind:tap="addToCart">加入购物车</van-button> <van-button type="danger" bind:tap="pay">立即购买</van-button> </view> </view>
<van-empty wx:else description="加载中或课程不存在"/>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <view class="page"> <van-field label="年龄" type="number" value="{{age}}" bind:change="onAgeChange" placeholder="请输入年龄" maxlength="2" clearable /> <van-button class="submit-btn" type="primary" block loading="{{saving}}" bind:tap="submit">保存</van-button> </view>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <view class="page"> <van-field label="邮箱" value="{{email}}" bind:change="onEmailChange" placeholder="请输入邮箱" clearable /> <van-button class="submit-btn" type="primary" block loading="{{saving}}" bind:tap="submit">保存</van-button> </view>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <view class="page"> <van-radio-group value="{{gender}}" bind:change="onGenderChange"> <van-cell-group> <van-cell title="男" clickable data-value="1" bind:click="onGenderTap"> <van-radio name="1" /> </van-cell> <van-cell title="女" clickable data-value="0" bind:click="onGenderTap"> <van-radio name="0" /> </van-cell> <van-cell title="保密" clickable data-value="2" bind:click="onGenderTap"> <van-radio name="2" /> </van-cell> </van-cell-group> </van-radio-group> <van-button class="submit-btn" type="primary" block loading="{{saving}}" bind:tap="submit">保存</van-button> </view>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <view class="page"> <van-field label="描述" type="textarea" value="{{info}}" bind:change="onInfoChange" placeholder="请输入描述" maxlength="170" autosize clearable /> <van-button class="submit-btn" type="primary" block loading="{{saving}}" bind:tap="submit">保存</van-button> </view>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <view class="page"> <van-field label="昵称" value="{{nickname}}" bind:change="onNicknameChange" placeholder="请输入昵称" maxlength="10" clearable /> <van-button class="submit-btn" type="primary" block loading="{{saving}}" bind:tap="submit">保存</van-button> </view>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<view class="page"> <van-field label="省份" value="{{province}}" readonly is-link placeholder="请选择省份" bind:tap="openPicker" /> <van-button class="submit-btn" type="primary" block loading="{{saving}}" bind:tap="submit">保存</van-button> </view>
<van-popup show="{{pickerVisible}}" position="bottom" bind:close="closePicker"> <van-picker columns="{{provinceColumns}}" bind:confirm="onPickerConfirm" bind:cancel="closePicker" /> </van-popup>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<view class="page"> <van-field label="星座" value="{{zodiac}}" readonly is-link placeholder="请选择星座" bind:tap="openPicker" /> <van-button class="submit-btn" type="primary" block loading="{{saving}}" bind:tap="submit">保存</van-button> </view>
<van-popup show="{{pickerVisible}}" position="bottom" bind:close="closePicker"> <van-picker columns="{{zodiacOptions}}" bind:confirm="onPickerConfirm" bind:cancel="closePicker" /> </van-popup>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<scroll-view scroll-y class="user-scroll" wx:if="{{user}}"> <view class="user-head"> <van-row> <van-col class="avatar-col" wx:if="{{user.avatar}}" span="8"> <van-uploader file-list="{{avatarFile}}" bind:after-read="uploadAvatar" max-count="1" accept="image" deletable="{{false}}"> <van-image src="{{user.avatarUrl}}" width="100" height="100" fit="cover" round/> </van-uploader> </van-col> <van-col class="nickname-col" span="16"> <view>{{user.nickname}}</view> <view> <van-tag size="medium" mark type="primary">{{user.age}}岁</van-tag> <van-tag size="medium" mark type="danger">{{user.zodiac}}</van-tag> <van-tag size="medium" mark type="warning">{{user.province}}</van-tag> </view> </van-col> </van-row> </view>
<view class="operation-btn"> <van-grid gutter="20rpx"> <van-grid-item text="我的课程" url="/pages/user/video/video" icon="video" link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-grid-item text="我的订单" url="/pages/user/order/order" icon="shop-o" link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-grid-item text="我的收藏" url="/pages/user/follow/follow" icon="star" link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-grid-item text="我的账号" url="/pages/user/account/account" icon="user" link-type="navigateTo"/> </van-grid> </view>
<view class="user-body"> <van-cell-group> <van-cell title="昵称" value="{{user.nickname}}" url="{{ NICKNAME_UPDATE_URL + user.nickname }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="性别" value="{{user.gender === 2 ? '保密': user.gender === 1 ? '男': '女'}}" url="{{ GENDER_UPDATE_URL + user.gender }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="年龄" value="{{user.age}}" url="{{ AGE_UPDATE_URL + user.age }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="星座" value="{{user.zodiac}}" url="{{ ZODIAC_UPDATE_URL + user.zodiac }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="省份" value="{{user.province}}" url="{{ PROVINCE_UPDATE_URL + user.province }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="邮箱" value="{{user.email}}" url="{{ EMAIL_UPDATE_URL + user.email }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="描述" value="{{user.info}}" url="{{ INFO_UPDATE_URL + user.info }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="真实姓名" value="{{user.realname}}" title-width="70px"/> <van-cell title="身份证号" value="{{user.idcard}}" title-width="70px"/> <van-cell title="手机号码" value="{{user.phone}}" title-width="70px"/> </van-cell-group> </view>
<view class="user-foot"> <van-button bind:tap="logout" block type="danger">退出登录</van-button> </view> </scroll-view> <view wx:elif="{{loading}}" class="user-loading">加载中…</view> <view wx:else class="user-loading">未获取到用户信息，请重新登录</view>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<scroll-view scroll-y class="user-scroll" wx:if="{{user}}"> <view class="user-head"> <van-row> <van-col class="avatar-col" wx:if="{{user.avatarUrl}}" span="8"> <van-uploader file-list="{{avatarFile}}" bind:after-read="uploadAvatar" max-count="1" accept="image" deletable="{{false}}"> <van-image src="{{user.avatarUrl}}" bind:error="handleAvatarError" width="100" height="100" fit="cover" round/> </van-uploader> </van-col> <van-col class="nickname-col" span="16"> <view>{{user.nickname}}</view> <view> <van-tag size="medium" mark type="primary">{{user.age}}岁</van-tag> <van-tag size="medium" mark type="danger">{{user.zodiac}}</van-tag> <van-tag size="medium" mark type="warning">{{user.province}}</van-tag> </view> </van-col> </van-row> </view>
<view class="operation-btn"> <van-grid gutter="20rpx"> <van-grid-item text="我的课程" url="/pages/user/video/video" icon="video" link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-grid-item text="我的订单" url="/pages/user/order/order" icon="shop-o" link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-grid-item text="我的收藏" url="/pages/user/follow/follow" icon="star" link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-grid-item text="我的账号" url="/pages/user/account/account" icon="user" link-type="navigateTo"/> </van-grid> </view>
<view class="user-body"> <van-cell-group> <van-cell title="昵称" value="{{user.nickname}}" url="{{ NICKNAME_UPDATE_URL + user.nickname }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="性别" value="{{user.gender === 2 ? '保密': user.gender === 1 ? '男': '女'}}" url="{{ GENDER_UPDATE_URL + user.gender }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="年龄" value="{{user.age}}" url="{{ AGE_UPDATE_URL + user.age }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="星座" value="{{user.zodiac}}" url="{{ ZODIAC_UPDATE_URL + user.zodiac }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="省份" value="{{user.province}}" url="{{ PROVINCE_UPDATE_URL + user.province }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="邮箱" value="{{user.email}}" url="{{ EMAIL_UPDATE_URL + user.email }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="描述" value="{{user.info}}" url="{{ INFO_UPDATE_URL + user.info }}" title-width="70px" is-link link-type="navigateTo"/> <van-cell title="真实姓名" value="{{user.realname}}" title-width="70px"/> <van-cell title="身份证号" value="{{user.idcard}}" title-width="70px"/> <van-cell title="手机号码" value="{{user.phone}}" title-width="70px"/> </van-cell-group> </view>
<view class="user-foot"> <van-button bind:tap="logout" block type="danger">退出登录</van-button> </view> </scroll-view> <view wx:elif="{{loading}}" class="user-loading">加载中…</view> <view wx:else class="user-loading">未获取到用户信息，请重新登录</view>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
